query:
SELECT 
  MONTH(updatedAt) as mes,
  YEAR(updatedAt) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total_baixas
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
  AND YEAR(updatedAt) = 2026
  AND MONTH(updatedAt) IN (1, 2, 3)
GROUP BY YEAR(updatedAt), MONTH(updatedAt)
ORDER BY MONTH(updatedAt);
